0.q: Mannitol is one of the key compatible solutes in A. baumannii, and it is synthesized by a bifunctional mannitol-1-phosphate dehydrogenase/phosphatase (AbMtlD). AbMtlD catalyzes the conversion of fructose-6-phosphate to mannitol in two consecutive steps.

1.q: OtsA, a trehalose-6-phosphate synthase, condenses glucose-6-phosphate and UDP-glucose to trehalose-6-phosphate (Tre-6-P), which is dephosphorylated by OtsB, a trehalose-6-phosphate phosphatase to trehalose.

2.q: OtsA, a trehalose-6-phosphate synthase, condenses glucose-6-phosphate and UDP-glucose to trehalose-6-phosphate (Tre-6-P), which is dephosphorylated by OtsB, a trehalose-6-phosphate phosphatase to trehalose.

3.q: Deletion of wax/dgat completely abolished WE as well as TAG production... Complementation of the Δwax/dgat::kanR mutant restored WE and TAG production.

4.q: Deletion of wax/dgat completely abolished WE as well as TAG production... Complementation of the Δwax/dgat::kanR mutant restored WE and TAG production.
